description: Delete an automation. This tool requires explicit `confirm=true` and returns a preview before execution.

automation_id.description: Automation identifier returned by `list_automations`, `get_automation`, or automation write previews.
automation_id.title: Automation Id

confirm.description: Explicit confirmation flag required for destructive delete operations.
confirm.title: Confirm

kind.description: Configured automation kind, for example `workflow`. Discover supported values with `list_automation_kinds`.
kind.title: Kind

preview_only.description: When true, only compute the delete preview and do not execute the delete.
preview_only.title: Preview Only

name: delete_automation
